channel.title: Incident Analysis on Trend Research
channel.description: Recent content in Incident Analysis on Trend Research

item.title: Claude Code Leak Claims in April 2026: What Was Exposed, What Was Overstated, and What People Got Wrong
item.description: A source-grounded study of the April 2026 Claude Code leak claims, separating verified package evidence from rumor, clarifying the role of npm artifacts and system prompts, and assessing what was and was not actually exposed.

item.title: The Axios npm Supply-Chain Compromise of March 2026
item.description: A professional incident analysis of the Axios npm supply-chain compromise, including affected versions, technical mechanism, response timeline, exposure assessment, and practical prevention guidance for users and maintainers.
